info.title: Rapidata Leaderboard API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Leaderboard service

requestBody.description: The payload describing the benchmark to create.

post.summary: Creates a participant in a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark the participant will be added to.

requestBody.description: The payload describing the participant to create.

get.summary: Queries all participants within a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark whose participants will be returned.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by id.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by name.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status.

post.summary: Adds a new prompt to a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to add the prompt to.

requestBody.description: The payload describing the prompt to create.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to delete.

get.summary: Returns a single benchmark by its id.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to load.

patch.summary: Updates a benchmark using patch semantics.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to update.

requestBody.description: The patch payload describing which fields should change.

delete.summary: Deletes a participant on a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark the participant belongs to.

parameters.name: participantId
parameters.description: The id of the participant to delete.

post.summary: Creates a copy of a public benchmark and all of its related entities.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to fork.

get.summary: Returns the pairwise vote matrix for a benchmark.
get.description: The matrix is returned in pandas split format.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The identifier of the benchmark.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Optional tags to filter the matrix entries.

parameters.name: participantIds
parameters.description: Optional participant identifiers to include in the matrix.

parameters.name: leaderboardIds
parameters.description: Optional leaderboard identifiers to scope the matrix.

parameters.name: useWeightedScoring
parameters.description: Whether to apply weighted scoring to the matrix values.

get.summary: Returns the combined pairwise vote matrix for multiple benchmarks.

parameters.name: benchmarkIds
parameters.description: The identifiers of the benchmarks to combine.

parameters.name: useWeightedScoring
parameters.description: Whether to apply weighted scoring to the matrix values.

get.summary: Returns the combined standings for multiple benchmarks.

parameters.name: benchmarkIds
parameters.description: The identifiers of the benchmarks to combine.

parameters.name: useWeightedScoring
parameters.description: Whether to apply weighted scoring.

parameters.name: includeConfidenceIntervals
parameters.description: Whether to include confidence intervals in results.

get.summary: Returns the paged prompts of a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark to query.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by id.

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Filter by created_at.

get.summary: Queries all standings for a benchmark.

parameters.name: benchmarkId
parameters.description: The id of the benchmark whose standings should be queried.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: The tags to filter the standings by.

parameters.name: participantIds
parameters.description: The participant ids to filter by; leave empty for no filter.

parameters.name: leaderboardIds
parameters.description: The leaderboard ids to filter by; leave empty for no filter.

parameters.name: useWeightedScoring
parameters.description: Whether to apply weighted scoring based on user scores.

parameters.name: includeConfidenceIntervals
parameters.description: Whether to include confidence intervals in results.

participants.description: The participants of the given leaderboard that should be boosted.

totalResponses.description: The total responses to add, shared across all participants.

id.description: The id of the created benchmark.

participantId.description: The id of the created participant.

datasetId.description: The id of the participant's dataset.

benchmarkId.description: If the leaderboard should be added to a preexisting benchmark, the benchmark id.

benchmarkName.description: When no BenchmarkId is provided, the name of the new benchmark to create.

instruction.description: The instruction datapoints will be matched up against.

showPrompt.description: Indicates if the prompt is shown on the rapids.

showPromptAsset.description: Whether the prompt asset should be shown on the rapids.

responseBudget.description: Total amount of responses that get collected per run.

minResponses.description: The minimum amount of responses that need to be collected per comparison.

isInversed.description: Whether the results should be inversed, selecting the worse model.

audienceId.description: Optional audience id; defaults to the global audience when unset.

featureFlags.description: Feature flags applied to every order created by this leaderboard.

id.description: The id of the created leaderboard.

benchmarkId.description: The id of the benchmark the leaderboard belongs to.

isInversed.description: Whether the leaderboard results are inversed.

current.description: The current sample that navigation is anchored on.

previous.description:
Up to three samples of the same participant preceding the current sample,
 ordered ascending by identifier. Empty when the current sample is the first
 of its participant.

next.description:
Up to three samples of the same participant following the current sample,
 ordered ascending by identifier. Empty when the current sample is the last
 of its participant.

related.description:
Samples of other participants in the same benchmark that share the current
 sample's identifier.
